pending.body: Preserve `default_model` overrides for the new Codex defaults. `default_backend_runtime_settings()` now hardcodes `backends.codex.role_models.implementer = gpt-5.4-high` and `backends.codex.role_models.final_reviewer = gpt-5.4-xhigh` ([src/contexts/workspace_governance/config.rs:1542-1547]), `EffectiveConfig::load` makes the implementer backend selection explicit by default ([src/contexts/workspace_governance/config.rs:427-435]), and `target_for_family()` always prefers `role_models` over `base_backend.model/default_model` ([src/contexts/agent_execution/policy.rs:327-340]). As a result, a workspace/project override like `default_backend = "codex"` plus `default_model = "override-model"` no longer changes the implementer or first final-review reviewer: `backend probe --role implementer` / `final_reviewer` still resolve to `gpt-5.4-high` / `gpt-5.4-xhigh`. That regresses the existing workspace/project override path the bead explicitly says must keep working.

status_summary: running: final review restart round 7 -> Plan and Implement
